settings.text: Designed in India. Built for the world.
We started Zelexto with a simple belief: that world-class products don’t need to come from somewhere else. We design and manufacture in India, work with people we know, and use materials we trust.

settings.heading: Small batches, signed by hand.
settings.body: Every batch is made by a workshop we partner with directly. We meet them. We pay fairly. The work is signed.

settings.heading: Honest, traceable.
settings.body: Every material we use can be traced back to its source. No greenwashing, no marketing gloss.

settings.heading: No middlemen mark-ups.
settings.body: We sell direct, which means you pay for the product, not five layers of distribution.

settings.question: Where is Zelexto based?
settings.answer: We're based in India, with workshops across the country.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes — we ship globally with regional warehousing in select markets.

settings.question: How can I contact you?
settings.answer: Drop a note at contact — we reply within 24h on weekdays.
